post.description:
Get all paginated log entries.
You can specify different filters in your request body. Available filters are:
  • like and equals: Filter by key and value. Allowed keys:
    • priority
    • component
    • relatedobject
    • message
    • pid
  • dateFrom and dateTo: Filter by date (from, to)
  • page: Used for offset calculation in pagination. To be used, needs to be defined together with the pageSize
  • pageSize: Used for limiting the result numbers per page. To be used, needs to be defined together with the page

200.description: Paginated log entries with total count as header param as JSON

post.summary: Get chart data for a specific report
post.description:
Get paginated chart data for a specific report by name.
Parameters are:
  • name (required): Name of existing custom report
  • filters: Array of filters to filter the data
    • columnFilters: Allow filtering based on the columns and their values
    • drillDownFilters: Filter based on pre-defined drill down filters
  • sortBy: Column name to sort the data by
  • sortOrder: Sort order (ASC/DESC)
  • page: Offset, can be used in combination with pageSize
  • pageSize: Limit returned data
  • fields: Array of fields to be included in the data. If not provided, all fields will be included

pageSize.description: Page size of the report data

fields.description: Fields to be included in the chart data. If not provided, all fields will be included.

200.description: Chart data as JSON. The actual data depends on the selected adapter in the report configuration.

post.description:
Creating the CSV export file for custom reports.
Parameters are:
  • name (required): Name of custom report
  • filters: Array of filters to filter the data
    • columnFilters: Allow filtering based on the columns and their values
    • drillDownFilters: Filter based on pre-defined drill down filters
  • sortBy: Column name to sort the data by
  • sortOrder: Sort order (ASC/DESC)
  • page: Offset, can be used in combination with pageSize
  • pageSize: Limit returned data
  • includeHeaders: Include headers in the export
  • delimiter: Delimiter can be set to anything, but the default is a semicolon/li>
Download has to be triggered separately via the csv download route with the {jobRunId} returned in the response

pageSize.description: Page size of the report data
